allow: Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d fiery_eyes -c "\\dt" 2>&1)
Bash(tree -L 3 /opt/fiery-eyes --dirsfirst -I 'venv|__pycache__|*.pyc' 2>/dev/null || find /opt/fiery-eyes -not -path '*/venv/*' -not -path '*/__pycache__/*' -type f | sort)
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d fiery_eyes -f db/migrations/v2_health_score.sql 2>&1)
Bash(python -c "from health_score.engine import score_token; print\('Health Score engine OK'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(which python3 && ls /opt/fiery-eyes/venv/bin/python* 2>/dev/null || echo "checking alternatives" && which python3.12 python3.11 python3.10 2>/dev/null)
Bash(/opt/fiery-eyes/venv/bin/python -c "from telegram_alpha.entry_pipeline import execute_entry; print\('Entry pipeline OK'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(/opt/fiery-eyes/venv/bin/python -c "from shadow.tracker import get_shadow_summary; print\('Shadow tracker OK'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(/opt/fiery-eyes/venv/bin/python main.py health JUPyiwrYJFskUPiHa7hkeR8VUtAeFoSYbKedZNsDvCN 2>&1)
Bash(/opt/fiery-eyes/venv/bin/python main.py regime 2>&1)
Bash(/opt/fiery-eyes/venv/bin/python -c "from telegram_bot.huoyan_pulse import generate_pulse; print\('Huoyan pulse OK'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(/opt/fiery-eyes/venv/bin/python -c "from telegram_bot.override_commands import parse_override; print\('Override commands OK'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(/opt/fiery-eyes/venv/bin/python -c "from shadow.moonbag_reaper import run_moonbag_reaper; print\('Moonbag reaper OK'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(/opt/fiery-eyes/venv/bin/python -c "from telegram_alpha.kk_parser import parse_message; print\('KK parser OK'\); addrs = parse_message\('Check out this token JUPyiwrYJFskUPiHa7hkeR8VUtAeFoSYbKedZNsDvCN'\); print\(f'Parsed {len\(addrs\)} address\(es\): {addrs}'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d fiery_eyes -c "\\dt" 2>&1 | grep -E "kol_|health_|shadow_|telegram_")
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d fiery_eyes -c "SELECT name, tier, style FROM kol_wallets ORDER BY tier, name;" 2>&1)
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d fiery_eyes -c "SELECT token_address, scaled_score, confidence_pct, recommended_action, token_tier FROM health_scores LIMIT 5;" 2>&1)

Bash(echo "=== NEW FILES CREATED ===" && find /opt/fiery-eyes -newer /opt/fiery-eyes/main.py -name "*.py" -o -name "*.sql" -o -name "*.service" -o -name "*.template" 2>/dev/null | sort && echo "" && echo "=== MODIFIED FILES ===" && echo "config.py" && echo "main.py" && echo "regime/multiplier.py" && echo "requirements.txt")

Bash(find /opt/fiery-eyes/health_score /opt/fiery-eyes/kol_tracking /opt/fiery-eyes/telegram_alpha /opt/fiery-eyes/shadow /opt/fiery-eyes/telegram_bot/severity.py /opt/fiery-eyes/telegram_bot/huoyan_pulse.py /opt/fiery-eyes/telegram_bot/override_commands.py /opt/fiery-eyes/monitoring/data_health.py -name "*.py" 2>/dev/null | sort)
